Hannah is trying to solve the following problem with a ratio table. Fill in the last column of the ratio table to answer the question.

One chocolate bar has $6$ squares. How many squares are there in $6$ chocolate bars?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
chocolate bars & 1 & 2 & 4 & \\
\hline
squares & 6 & 12 & 24 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
